mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_conversation_summary ( id, task_id, user_id, summary_type, covered_message_start_id, covered_message_end_id, covered_message_count, raw_token_estimate, compressed_token_estimate, summary_json, summary_text, key_facts_json, evidence_refs_json, compression_model, compression_prompt_version, compression_version, status, diagnostics_json ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{taskId}, #{userId}, #{summaryType}, #{coveredMessageStartId}, #{coveredMessageEndId}, #{coveredMessageCount}, #{rawTokenEstimate}, #{compressedTokenEstimate}, #{summaryJson}, #{summaryText}, #{keyFactsJson}, #{evidenceRefsJson}, #{compressionModel}, #{compressionPromptVersion}, #{compressionVersion}, #{status}, #{diagnosticsJson} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_conversation_summary WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT s.* FROM agent_conversation_summary s JOIN agent_chat_message m ON m.task_id = s.task_id AND m.id = s.covered_message_end_id WHERE s.task_id = #{taskId} AND s.covered_message_end_id IS NOT NULL AND s.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'SUPERSEDED', 'HIGH_LOSS_RISK') ORDER BY m.sequence_no DESC, s.created_at DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT 1
